reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a math question, and verified the agent responded with the correct answer "4".
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Success. App loaded with sidebar showing two agents including target agent "QA-20260710-195931-w8jj" with idle status.
Clicked on QA-20260710-195931-w8jj agent button in sidebar - Success. Navigated to agent home page.
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Success. Agent status shows "idle".
Typed message "Hello! What is 2+2?" into the message input field - Success. Message entered into active textbox.
Clicked Send message button - Success. Message sent and chat view opened with session "Basic Math Question Session".
Waited for and received agent response - Success. Agent responded with "4" within 1 second, as shown in the screenshot with "Worked for 1s" indicator.
Verified response mentions "4" and took screenshot - Success. Response clearly shows "4" as the answer, and screenshot captured (qa-test-final-screenshot.png).
